replicaCount.description: Backend replica count. Safe to scale > 1 once the Phase 2 Redis cross-pod lock (docs/adr/0003-midas-redis-cross-pod-job-locks.md) is active AND the ALB target group has lb_cookie stickiness enabled (deploy/ecs-app/modules/alb-nlb/main.tf). Cap is 5 to bound node-capacity blast radius for the 53Gi-per-pod backend; raise after validating Karpenter capacity for N x 53Gi.

awsRegion.description: Literal AWS region for boto3 (overrides midas-app-secret envFrom for AWS_* region keys).

rdsPostgresHost.description: RDS endpoint hostname. When non-empty, sets AWS_RDS_POSTGRES_HOST env var so the app loader can resolve the host even when the RDS-managed secret only contains username/password after rotation.

rdsPostgresPort.description: RDS port (default 5432). When non-empty, sets AWS_RDS_POSTGRES_PORT env var.
